name: CPI Card Group Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Busines s As used herein, CPI, the Company, we, our and similar terms refer to CPI Card Group Inc. and its subsidiaries, unless the context indicates otherwise. Overview CPI is a payments technology company providing a comprehensive range of physical and digital payment solutions for U.S. financial institutions, processors, fintechs, prepaid program managers, and more.
